records.m_Talk_ENG: You two okay back there?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You two okay back there?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You two okay back there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't believe I got my client exposed to an explosion. I feel so ashamed of myself as an explosive expert.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't believe I got my client exposed to an explosion. I feel so ashamed of myself as an explosive expert.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't believe I got my client exposed to an explosion. I feel so ashamed of myself as an explosive expert.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm okay. Thank you for saving us, Miss Chowon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm okay. Thank you for saving us, Miss Chowon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm okay. Thank you for saving us, Miss Chowon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They blocked off our route with a Corrupted Wedge as if they were waiting for us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They blocked off our route with a Corrupted Wedge as if they were waiting for us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They blocked off our route with a Corrupted Wedge as if they were waiting for us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not their normal behavior.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not their normal behavior.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not their normal behavior.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then... are you saying they're after us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then... are you saying they're after us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then... are you saying they're after us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Looks like we have more bad news. The CSE level of this area is rapidly increasing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Looks like we have more bad news. The CSE level of this area is rapidly increasing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Looks like we have more bad news. The CSE level of this area is rapidly increasing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Multiple Category 3 C.O. signals! They're coming right at us!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Multiple Category 3 C.O. signals! They're coming right at us!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Multiple Category 3 C.O. signals! They're coming right at us!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-we're done for!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-we're done for!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-we're done for!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you both unharmed?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you both unharmed?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you both unharmed?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, I think I'm good...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, I think I'm good...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, I think I'm good...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But that's odd. The CSE level suddenly returned to normal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But that's odd. The CSE level suddenly returned to normal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But that's odd. The CSE level suddenly returned to normal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the C.O.s we saw just a second ago... They're all gone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the C.O.s we saw just a second ago... They're all gone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the C.O.s we saw just a second ago... They're all gone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't even find the Corrupted Wedge. How's this possible...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't even find the Corrupted Wedge. How's this possible...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't even find the Corrupted Wedge. How's this possible...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...CSE Levels stabilizing. Lifting the Corruption alert.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...CSE Levels stabilizing. Lifting the Corruption alert.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...CSE Levels stabilizing. Lifting the Corruption alert.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To all agents on the field, good work.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To all agents on the field, good work.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To all agents on the field, good work.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Phew. Is it over now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Phew. Is it over now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Phew. Is it over now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't believe the CSE Level went up to 3 in a stabilized city like Charade.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't believe the CSE Level went up to 3 in a stabilized city like Charade.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't believe the CSE Level went up to 3 in a stabilized city like Charade.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's going to happen next?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's going to happen next?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's going to happen next?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? I came here as fast as I could, but the alert's already been lifted?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? I came here as fast as I could, but the alert's already been lifted?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? I came here as fast as I could, but the alert's already been lifted?

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* Guess I'll get another earful from Richard again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* Guess I'll get another earful from Richard again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* Guess I'll get another earful from Richard again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for your hard work, ma'am.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for your hard work, ma'am.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for your hard work, ma'am.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We couldn't have handled the situation without you, Miss Ozymandias.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We couldn't have handled the situation without you, Miss Ozymandias.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We couldn't have handled the situation without you, Miss Ozymandias.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? Didn't you just return from resolving the Category 3 from the Grand Dimension Crevice?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? Didn't you just return from resolving the Category 3 from the Grand Dimension Crevice?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? Didn't you just return from resolving the Category 3 from the Grand Dimension Crevice?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah! Of course! How did you know?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah! Of course! How did you know?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah! Of course! How did you know?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm the most honorable person in this city! It's my duty to serve!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm the most honorable person in this city! It's my duty to serve!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm the most honorable person in this city! It's my duty to serve!

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, now. Let's just skip over the trivial stuff.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, now. Let's just skip over the trivial stuff.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, now. Let's just skip over the trivial stuff.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please put my name in the report, okay? Without it, Richard will nag me about it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please put my name in the report, okay? Without it, Richard will nag me about it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please put my name in the report, okay? Without it, Richard will nag me about it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I gotta get back to my shopping. Bye!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I gotta get back to my shopping. Bye!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I gotta get back to my shopping. Bye!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh, please, show mercy...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh, please, show mercy...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh, please, show mercy...

records.m_Talk_ENG: At least, spare my child, please...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: At least, spare my child, please...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: At least, spare my child, please...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We received reports that the Corruption alert had stopped.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We received reports that the Corruption alert had stopped.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We received reports that the Corruption alert had stopped.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What happened, C.O.? Didn't you say you could intentionally manipulate the Counterside Effect?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What happened, C.O.? Didn't you say you could intentionally manipulate the Counterside Effect?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What happened, C.O.? Didn't you say you could intentionally manipulate the Counterside Effect?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Something cut off. The connection.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Something cut off. The connection.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Something cut off. The connection.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Someone. Interfering. I will try again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Someone. Interfering. I will try again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Someone. Interfering. I will try again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Coming up with excuses like a human. You just had to learn that, didn't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Coming up with excuses like a human. You just had to learn that, didn't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Coming up with excuses like a human. You just had to learn that, didn't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But what's done is done. Handle it better next time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But what's done is done. Handle it better next time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But what's done is done. Handle it better next time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There was a witness. One of you. I killed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There was a witness. One of you. I killed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There was a witness. One of you. I killed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do I do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do I do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do I do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Scum you find in the sewers are garbage that are not even third-grade citizens.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Scum you find in the sewers are garbage that are not even third-grade citizens.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Scum you find in the sewers are garbage that are not even third-grade citizens.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't bother me with trivial matters and wait for my next call.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't bother me with trivial matters and wait for my next call.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't bother me with trivial matters and wait for my next call.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The role you will be taking on is the <color=#ffd34c>hermit</color>. You will be tasked with infiltrating human society.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The role you will be taking on is the <color=#ffd34c>hermit</color>. You will be tasked with infiltrating human society.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The role you will be taking on is the <color=#ffd34c>hermit</color>. You will be tasked with infiltrating human society.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hermit?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hermit?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hermit?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Throughout all of history, human development has been driven by competition.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Throughout all of history, human development has been driven by competition.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Throughout all of history, human development has been driven by competition.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why they fear C.O.s, but also want to obtain their power.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why they fear C.O.s, but also want to obtain their power.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why they fear C.O.s, but also want to obtain their power.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As Replacers did in the past, and now the Northern Union...
records.m_Talk_DEU: As Replacers did in the past, and now the Northern Union...
records.m_Talk_FRA: As Replacers did in the past, and now the Northern Union...

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, it's those in power who think this way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, it's those in power who think this way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, it's those in power who think this way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you use that desire appropriately, you will also easily obtain what you want.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you use that desire appropriately, you will also easily obtain what you want.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you use that desire appropriately, you will also easily obtain what you want.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I desire. Possibilities.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I desire. Possibilities.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I desire. Possibilities.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I do not have.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I do not have.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I do not have.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I'll prepare that stage for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I'll prepare that stage for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I'll prepare that stage for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thus, when the opportunity arises, take it and cause a Counterside Effect near Charade's Grand Dimension Crevice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thus, when the opportunity arises, take it and cause a Counterside Effect near Charade's Grand Dimension Crevice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thus, when the opportunity arises, take it and cause a Counterside Effect near Charade's Grand Dimension Crevice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So that I will be able to enter it...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So that I will be able to enter it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So that I will be able to enter it...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I understand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I understand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I understand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Humans. All. Act on profit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Humans. All. Act on profit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Humans. All. Act on profit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even that man. And... that woman...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even that man. And... that woman...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even that man. And... that woman...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Swan. Even Swan Claire...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Swan. Even Swan Claire...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Swan. Even Swan Claire...

records.m_Talk_ENG: For profit. Kill. Even own kind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For profit. Kill. Even own kind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For profit. Kill. Even own kind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ke, kekeke...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ke, kekeke...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ke, kekeke...

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you use that desire appropriately, you will also easily obtain what you want.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you use that desire appropriately, you will also easily obtain what you want.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you use that desire appropriately, you will also easily obtain what you want.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I desire. Possibilities.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I desire. Possibilities.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I desire. Possibilities.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I do not have.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I do not have.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I do not have.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I'll prepare that stage for you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I'll prepare that stage for you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I'll prepare that stage for you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thus, when the opportunity arises, take it and cause a Counterside Effect near Charade's Grand Dimension Crevice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thus, when the opportunity arises, take it and cause a Counterside Effect near Charade's Grand Dimension Crevice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thus, when the opportunity arises, take it and cause a Counterside Effect near Charade's Grand Dimension Crevice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So that I will be able to enter it...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So that I will be able to enter it...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So that I will be able to enter it...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I understand.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I understand.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I understand.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Humans. All. Act on profit.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Humans. All. Act on profit.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Humans. All. Act on profit.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even that man. And... that woman...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even that man. And... that woman...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even that man. And... that woman...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Swan. Even Swan Claire...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Swan. Even Swan Claire...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Swan. Even Swan Claire...

root.m_Talk_ENG: For profit. Kill. Even own kind.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For profit. Kill. Even own kind.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For profit. Kill. Even own kind.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ke, kekeke...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ke, kekeke...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ke, kekeke...
